_README: Hand-curated pitch ground truth for Phase C pitch accuracy iteration. Each entry maps a notehead position (cx, cy) to its expected MIDI pitch based on visual inspection of small crops + music theory + assumed clef.
_clef_assumption: Staff 0 of Beethoven orchestral score appears to be treble clef (Vln 1). Verified visually from contact sheet that noteheads at top of staff = F5 (top line) and notes below progress as expected diatonic steps.
